flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at San Diego Mesa College rose 18% between 2021 and 2024 ($8.5k → $10.0k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at San Diego Mesa College rose 12% between 2007 and 2010 ($586 → $658).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at San Diego Mesa College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (6.1% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at San Diego Mesa College rose 69% between 2007 and 2010 (13.6k → 22.9k).
